WebView2InstallationRequiredContent: WebView2 is required to log in using this method. By clicking OK the browser will be opened to download the WebView2 Runtime automatically, please restart the app after the installation.

WebView2InstallationRequiredTitle: WebView2 is required to log in using this method

ToolTipService.ToolTip:
WebView2 is required to log in using this method.
After you input the account and password, the app will keep it in the local storage

Click on the "Login" button will open WebView2 to login automatically，However, if the error occurred while executing the script, or a captcha popped up, you will need to complete the login process manually

If you don't trust the app, you can leave the text box empty, click login, and manually fill your credentials in the WebView

Domain Fronting：Disabling this will force the app to use the system proxy. If you cannot access Pixiv properly, then it is better not to disable this option.

Clicking Login will log you in using an external Chromium kernel browser such as Chrome or Edge. If this method fails, you can use other methods to try to login.

Domain fronting: Disabling this will use the current local IE proxy. If you do not have direct access to pixiv at this time, you should not disable this option!
